behavior_trees.planner_output: Move forward until an obstacle is detected, then rotate left and move forward again. Repeat if necessary until reaching the target. If at the target, finish the task. If at_goal is true, finish the task. If any movement is blocked, rotate and try again. If call_llm is triggered, request a new behavior tree.

Move forward 1.5 meters, then rotate 90 degrees to the right. If an obstacle is detected, move backward 1 meter and try again. If the target is ahead, proceed straight to the target. If at_goal is true, finish the task. If the target is not reached after 3 attempts, request replanning.

Move forward 1.5 meters, then rotate 90 degrees to the right. If an obstacle is detected, move backward 1 meter and try again. If the target is ahead, proceed straight to the target. If at_goal is true, finish the task. If the target is not reached after 3 attempts, request replanning.
